summary: Completed testing of real VIX and GAMMA data integration for trading dashboard. Backend APIs working correctly with Yahoo Finance integration, frontend displays real-time data with minor UI refresh issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Underlying symbol display doesn't update immediately when switching between symbols (MNQ->MES->MYM->M2K)
ui_bugs.details: Backend APIs return correct underlying symbols (SPY, QQQ, DIA, IWM) but frontend may have caching or refresh delay

passed_tests: VIX endpoint returns real data with value, regime, source=yahoo_finance
GAMMA endpoint returns real data with net_gex, call_gex, put_gex, key_levels for all symbols
Volatility endpoint returns combined VIX and GAMMA data
Analyze endpoint includes real_vix and real_gamma in response
Frontend displays VIX (REAL) panel with value (23.87) and regime (ELEVATED)
Frontend displays GAMMA/GEX (REAL) panel with net_gex and key levels
VIX data sourced from yahoo_finance correctly
GAMMA data calculated from options chain data (QQQ for MNQ, SPY for MES, DIA for MYM, IWM for M2K)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor frontend issue: GAMMA underlying symbol display may need immediate refresh when switching symbols. Backend integration is fully functional.
